title: Xolantha villosissima
taxonomy: Xolantha villosissima is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The classification of Xolantha villosissima places it in the genus Xolantha, which is closely related to other genera within the same family. Xolantha villosissima is often characterized by its hairy leaves and stems, giving it a distinctive appearance. Further classification of the species can be refined through more detailed studies of its morphology and molecular characteristics.
